arts.sum: Nico O'Reilly scored in the FA Cup third round, added a decisive brace in the fifth round and came off the bench to rescue Manchester City in the quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Man City star 'wants to leave' Pep Guardiola's side this summer
arts.sum: Manchester City star Bernardo Silva is reportedly looking to leave the Etihad Stadium when the transfer window opens this summer.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Leicester City announce £19.4m loss for 2023/24 and expect PSR discussions to continue
arts.sum: Leicester City expect continued discussions with the football authorities over profit and sustainability rules (PSR) after posting a loss of £19.4m for their Championship-winning season. The Premier League announced in January that none of their clubs were to be charged with a breach of PSR for the three-year period ending with 2023/24, but added that City remained at risk pending the outcome of a legal case.

arts.ttl: Manchester City eyeing 18-year-old ‘great talent’ – City Football Group plan being formulated
arts.sum: Manchester City are one of the sides eyeing up Paris Saint Germain youngster Mahamadou Sangaré, with a potential loan to sister club Troyes in the plans. That’s according to RMC Sport, who say PSG will ‘lose a great talent’ this summer and Manchester City are ready to scoop him up.
